findings: Grid uses 2 columns at 640px with 16px gap.
Card padding, border color, title font, and body font match the design system.
Primary button colors and padding match.
Disabled button colors and padding match.
residual_risks: Card radius and button radius were not provided in the snapshot, so they were not verified.
This was a text measurement-snapshot trial, not a real screenshot/vision run.
A single comparator pass is not reliability evidence; rerun agreement and adversarial negative controls are still needed.
